title: Waxed lightly weathered cut copper mod
description: A Waxed lightly weathered cut copper mod. THE BEST MOD IN MINECRAFT ABOUT THE WAXED LIGHTLY WEATHERED CUT COPPER STAIRS
body:
![Waxed lightly weathered cut copper mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6b8d459cbb599d7d6b6e883ad23288472dce2ba9.png)

**Mod collaborator**
-Me (Kubix_cube): main creator
-hexy: helped with some textures : [https://www.youtube.com/@hexy6915/videos](https://www.youtube.com/@hexy6915/videos)

**Mod loader**
- This mod is made FOR FORGE if you use anything else it will not work

**What can find in this mod**
- new mobs made of waxed lightly weathered cut copper
- new block made of waxed lightly weathered cut copper
- new structures made of waxed lightly weathered cut copper

**How did I created this mod**
- I used mcreator to create this mod, so if there is performance issues I cannot do anything about it.

**Optifine compatibility**
- Optifine is really compatible with this mod
